hero.subheadline: At Serena Glow we care for your beauty with professional aesthetic and wellness services. Our goal is to help each client feel confident, relaxed, and radiant.

servicesPreview.title: Treatments & Services
servicesPreview.desc: We offer a variety of beauty services designed to care for your skin and well-being. We use quality products and professional techniques to ensure the best results.

members.name: Sofia Silva
members.desc: Helps enhance your natural beauty with simple and modern care.

members.name: Elena Costa
members.desc: Cares for the skin with facial cleansings and treatments to leave the face healthy.

members.name: Maria Santos
members.desc: Expert in manicure and pedicure, ensuring impeccable and well-cared nails.

members.name: Ana Oliveira
members.desc: Does makeup for parties, events and special occasions.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: See what our clients say about their experience at Serena Glow.

list.name: Ana João
list.text: I was very well attended. The girls are friendly and the atmosphere is very quiet.

list.name: Maria Celina
list.text: I really liked the result of the manicure and facial cleansing. I will come back more times.

list.name: Beatriz Luís
list.text: I loved the design of my eyebrows. The service is professional and very attentive.

pricing.title: Beauty Packages
pricing.desc: Choose the ideal package to care for your beauty and enjoy a complete experience.

list.a: At Serena Glow we offer several beauty services, including facial cleansing, facial treatment, nail care, makeup and eyebrows. All services are performed by qualified professionals.

list.q: How can I make an appointment?
list.a: You can make your appointment directly on our website through the 'Book Now' button, by phone, or by visiting our studio. We recommend booking in advance to ensure availability.

Yes. We use quality products and follow professional procedures to ensure the safety and well-being of our clients. Before some treatments, we conduct a small evaluation to choose the most suitable care for your skin.

list.q: How long does a facial treatment last?
list.a: The duration depends on the type of treatment, but normally a facial treatment lasts between 45 minutes and 1 hour and 30 minutes.

footer.descriptionMobile: Enhance your beauty with care and professionalism.
footer.privacyContent:
## Privacy Policy

Your privacy is important to us. At Serena Glow, we respect your privacy regarding any information we may collect from you across our website.

### 1. Information we collect
We collect personal information such as name, phone, and email only when needed to provide a service (such as bookings) to you.

### 2. Use of information
Your information is used exclusively to manage your bookings and improve your experience at our Studio.

### 3. Security
We protect your data using commercially acceptable means to prevent loss and theft, as well as unauthorized access, disclosure, copying, use, or modification.
footer.termsContent:
## Terms & Conditions

By accessing the Serena Glow website, you agree to comply with these terms of service.

### 1. Use of the Website
This website is intended to provide information about our services and allow the booking of beauty sessions.

### 2. Bookings
Bookings made through the website are subject to availability confirmation. We reserve the right to reschedule in case of scheduling conflicts.

### 3. Cancellations
We kindly ask you to cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours in advance, out of respect for our professionals' time and other clients.

about.title: About|Serena Glow
about.mission:
Serena Glow was born with the goal of offering beauty and wellness services with quality and professionalism.
Our Studio was created to be a space where clients can relax, take care of their beauty, and feel confident.

We work with dedication to offer skin, nail, makeup, and eyebrow services, always with attention to the comfort and satisfaction of our clients.

list.title: Mission
list.desc: Offer beauty services with quality, helping each client to feel good and confident.

list.title: Vision
list.desc: To be a leading beauty salon in Lichinga, known for good service and trust.

list.title: Values
list.desc: We work with respect, dedication and care, always focused on our clients' satisfaction.

about.cta: Ready to glow? Book your appointment today!

services.intro: We take care of your beauty with simple, affordable and professional services, designed for your daily life in Lichinga.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: At Serena Glow, we respect your privacy and guarantee the protection of your personal data.

sections.title: 1. Information we collect
sections.content:
We may collect information such as:
• Name
• Phone number
• Email
• Messages sent through the form

This information is used only to respond to your requests and book services.

sections.title: 2. Use of information
sections.content:
Your information is used for:
• Service booking
• Contacting the client
• Improving our service

We do not share your data with third parties.

sections.title: 3. Data protection
sections.content: We guarantee that your data is kept secure and used only for our service purposes.

sections.title: 4. Cookies
sections.content: Our site may use basic cookies to improve the browsing experience.

If you have questions about this policy, you can contact us:

Lichinga, Niassa – Mozambique
+258 84 000 0000
contacto@serenaglow.co.mz

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.intro: By using Serena Glow's services, you agree to the following terms:

sections.title: 1. Service booking
sections.content:
Appointments can be made through the website, phone, or in person.
We ask that you arrive at the scheduled time.

sections.title: 2. Cancellations
sections.content:
Cancellations must be made in advance.
Delays may result in rescheduling.

sections.title: 3. Payments
sections.content:
Services are paid on-site.
Prices are presented in Meticais (MZN).

sections.title: 4. Responsibility
sections.content:
We work with safe and professional products.
We recommend informing any allergy or sensitivity.

sections.title: 5. Changes
sections.content: Serena Glow may update these terms whenever necessary.
